node_kinds.name: CVE
node_kinds.description: A Common Vulnerabilities and Exposures entry representing a unique security vulnerability found on one or more Entra-joined devices

node_kinds.name: User
node_kinds.description: An AD or local user account observed logging on to a Defender-monitored device. Identified by SID when available, otherwise by DOMAIN\accountName.

relationship_kinds.name: FoundOn
relationship_kinds.description: A CVE is present on an AZDevice. Source: CVE node. Target: AZDevice node.

relationship_kinds.name: LoggedOnTo
relationship_kinds.description: A user credential is exposed on a device. Source: AZDevice node. Target: AZUser or User node. Attack path reads: compromise device → steal user credential.
